beefs.title: Back to the Beginning
beefs.about: Lack of a talk page isn’t a valid reason to revert the changes made. But it now exists, until a consensus can be reached, the poor quality content in question can remain in limbo. I’m not sure why this is so controversial. Voice your opinions now.
quotes: Lack of a talk page isn’t a valid reason to revert the changes made. But it now exists, until a consensus can be reached, the poor quality content in question can remain in limbo. I’m not sure why this is so controversial. Voice your opinions now.

Undid revision 1363041188 by ~2026-32779-65 (talk) Instead of edit warring over your preferred version, I recommend that you go to Talk:Back to the Beginning and discuss your changes until a consensus can be reached. After all, WP:BRD exists for a reason.

That would be unnecessary. The removal of poor, misleading, or biased information on Wikipedia articles is standard. Removal of such bad information doesn’t also require additions or counterpoints to be made, or a talk page made to discuss every change, as evident in this page’s edit history itself. Section has too many poor and biased examples that do not properly convey the overall reception of the concert. The section about yungblud was far too extensive and overblown, and...
